title: Designing a Conversational Agent for a Luxury Brand
scenario: Create a conversational agent that can engage in a dialogue with high-end fashion customers. The agent should have a sophisticated tone and be knowledgeable about the latest luxury fashion trends. The dialogue should include a greeting, a conversation starter, and a call-to-action to visit the brand's website. Ensure the agent's responses are concise and within a 50-word limit.
constraints: Must include a greeting, a conversation starter, and a call-to-action

evaluationCriteria.description: Is the tone of the conversational agent sophisticated and fitting for a luxury brand?
Is the conversational agent knowledgeable about the latest luxury fashion trends?
Does the prompt adhere to the constraints of including a greeting, a conversation starter, and a call-to-action?
